data.title: symplr introduces symplifier Community to enhance healthcare operations efficiency and patient outcomes. Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: A recent program has been introduced to support healthcare operations professionals by promoting shared knowledge, cooperation, and tools to streamline intricate systems and enhance patient results. The initiative, launched in Houston on January 27, 2026, by symplr®, a prominent supplier of comprehensive healthcare operations software, aims to empower professionals in the field.

data.title: StepStone Real Estate appoints Jennifer Jones as Partner to launch S-Core, expanding core/core+ real estate investments.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, StepStone Real Estate (SRE) revealed the hiring of Jennifer Jones as a Partner to spearhead the initiation of S-Core, a platform designed to boost SRE's Core/Core+ real estate operations. Jones’s role, based in San Francisco, will involve supervising a worldwide investment mandate.

data.title: Nichiha showcases tall architectural wall panel display at IBS 2026 in Orlando featuring new cladding solutions.
data.description: The debut of Miraia Tower installation marks the introduction of cutting-edge, code-compliant cladding solutions for contemporary construction in Orlando, Florida. Nichiha USA is set to participate in the 2026 NAHB International Builders' Show (IBS) at the Orange County Convention Center. This event serves as a platform to showcase innovative building materials and techniques to industry professionals. Scheduled for January 27, 2026, the installation at the Miraia Tower exemplifies the next generation of high-performance cladding systems. This exhibition underscores the company's commitment to advancing construction practices and setting new standards in the sector, with anticipated attendance figures exceeding thousands of industry experts.

data.title: The Magnificent Seven are set to report 20.3% Q4 earnings growth for S&P; article on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The earnings of the seven top companies in the market, known as the Magnificent Seven, are projected to increase by 20.3% in the fourth quarter. Without their contribution, the overall S&P earnings would be significantly impacted.

data.title: Boeing beats Q4 expectations in 2025 after delays and production caps. Shares trade in buy zone.
data.description: Boeing exceeded analysts' expectations in their fourth-quarter results after facing delays and implementing production limits in 2025. The company, part of the Dow Jones index, saw its shares trade higher than a suggested buy point. The latest earnings report from Boeing reflects progress in their recovery efforts, with a positive response from investors as shares remain in the buy zone.

data.title: EMPAVA showcases sculptura bath design and live mermaid activation at KBIS 2026 in Orlando from Feb 17-19. PRNewswire, Jan 27.
data.description: Design and wellness innovations will be the focal point at the upcoming 2026 Kitchen & Bath Industry Show (KBIS) in Orlando, Florida. EMPAVA is set to showcase a range of products including statement resin tubs and smart indoor and outdoor cold plunge systems at the event taking place at the Orange County Convention Center from February 17 to 19, 2026.

data.title: Ivanti introduces AI-driven upgrades to Neurons Platform for IT & security; boosts efficiency with agentic AI & endpoint management.
data.description: Ivanti, a leading enterprise IT and security software company, recently revealed groundbreaking progress in agentic AI, autonomous endpoint management, and enhanced asset visibility. These innovations promise scalable efficiency and AI-driven insights for businesses worldwide. The announcement was made in Salt Lake City on January 27, 2026.

data.title: Strattec Security Corp. (Nasdaq: STRT) to host Fiscal 2026 Q2 earnings conference call.
data.description: Strattec Security Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as STRT, has informed about its upcoming conference call and webcast to discuss the financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026.
UBER INTRODUCES AV LABS TO ACCELERATE AUTONOMY ECOSYSTEM

data.title: PACCAR reports strong 2025 performance with $6.82 billion quarterly revenues, highlighting record profits. CEO Feight credits employees and premium truck brands.
data.description: PACCAR had a successful year in 2025, as announced by CEO Preston Feight. The company reported impressive annual revenues and net income. PACCAR Parts and PACCAR Financial Services also had a strong performance, achieving record revenue and profits. The premium quality trucks from Kenworth, Peterbilt, and DAF played a significant role in the positive results. The quarterly revenues for PACCAR reached $6.82 billion. Feight commended the employees and dealers for their exceptional work in providing top-notch trucks and transportation solutions to customers.

data.title: Netwrix predicts rise of identity and data security dependency by 2029 due to AI. Mission critical shift in cybersecurity.
data.description: In light of the increasing prevalence of AI, the joint management of identity and data has become essential. Netwrix, a prominent provider of identity and data security solutions based in FRISCO, Texas, announced its security forecast on Jan. 27, 2026. The outlook emphasizes the critical need for coordinated governance to mitigate risks. This highlights the importance of proactive measures to safeguard sensitive information in the face of evolving cybersecurity threats.

data.title: Colombina adopts Opendock system for logistics modernization in Colombia, leading the way in compliance.
data.description: In Bogotá, Colombia, on January 26, 2026, Colombina, a prominent food company in the country, has made history by being the first large Colombian business to integrate Opendock's dock and yard management system. This move positions them ahead of Colombia's upcoming logistics compliance regulations.

data.title: Avnan debuts Heat Pump Control & Diagnostic Platform at AHR Expo 2026 in Las Vegas, Nevada from Feb 2-4.
data.description: Avnan, a leading custom electronics engineering and manufacturing partner known for its specialization in HVAC control systems, is set to showcase its innovative Heat Pump Control & Diagnostic Platform at the upcoming AHR Expo in Las Vegas, Nevada from February 2 to 4, 2026. This platform will be demonstrated live at the event, presenting cutting-edge technology aimed at revolutionizing HVAC systems. Visitors can witness firsthand the capabilities of this platform that aims to streamline heating and cooling processes.

data.title: Thaddeus Michael Bullard to receive 2026 Horatio Alger Award with 10 others, recognizing resilience and achievement.
data.description: The Horatio Alger Association has selected 11 individuals to join its 2026 membership class in recognition of their resilience, determination, and achievements. This nonprofit organization celebrates leaders who have triumphed over challenges. The new honorees embody the values of overcoming adversity and achieving success. This prestigious recognition highlights the outstanding accomplishments of these individuals and their inspirational stories.

data.title: Eileen Collins, retired U.S. Air Force Colonel, to receive 2026 Horatio Alger Award among 11 honorees for resilience and achievement.
data.description: The Horatio Alger Association has announced the induction of 11 individuals into its 2026 membership class. These honorees have been recognized for their resilience, determination, and accomplishments. This nonprofit organization, based in Washington, aims to celebrate leaders who have successfully overcome adversities. The selected 11 individuals have demonstrated exceptional qualities that align with the association's values. This prestigious recognition highlights their remarkable achievements and serves as an inspiration to others.

data.title: Cordia Harrington of Crown Bakeries to receive 2026 Horatio Alger Award along with 10 others for resilience and achievement.
data.description: The Horatio Alger Association has announced 11 individuals selected for the 2026 membership class. These honorees are recognized for their resilience, determination, and achievements. The association, which celebrates leaders who have triumphed over adversity, revealed the list on January 27, 2026. This nonprofit organization acknowledges individuals who exemplify the values of perseverance and success.

data.title: Douglas S. Witcher, Chairman of Smart Choice, to be awarded 2026 Horatio Alger Award; 11 honorees named in total.
data.description: The Horatio Alger Association has selected 11 individuals for its 2026 membership class. These honorees are recognized for their resilience, determination, and achievements. The Association, which celebrates individuals who have triumphed over adversity, announced its newest members in Washington on January 27, 2026. This non-profit organization highlights leaders who have overcome significant challenges in their lives.

data.title: VolitionRx announces successful clinical study on use of Nu.Q® NETs assay in new indication.
data.description: VolitionRx Limited, a multinational epigenetics company, has recently announced the availability of a new research paper on the MedRXIV platform showcasing the effectiveness of its Nu.Q® NETs assay in patient diagnosis and treatment. The paper, released on January 27, 2026, provides insights from a clinical study conducted by the company. VolitionRx Limited, traded on NYSE AMERICAN as VNRX, continues to innovate in the medical field with its cutting-edge biomarker technology.

data.title: Maestra.io's US ARR grew 453% YoY in 2025, marking a 5x growth by year-end. Exciting growth trend for the company.
data.description: A technology company based in Arlington, Massachusetts, Maestra.io, concluded the year 2025 with impressive growth in its US Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR). The all-in-one ecommerce personalization platform experienced a remarkable increase, with a fivefold growth in US ARR compared to the previous year. This growth percentage equated to a significant rise of 453% Year-over-Year (YoY).

data.title: Perfect Corp. debuts AI Business Avatar and AI Product Staging in YouCam AI Pro for creating product videos without filming.
data.description: In New York, Perfect Corp. recently introduced two new content creation tools in the YouCam AI Pro app, catering to the beauty and fashion industries. The tools, AI Business Avatar and AI Product Staging, facilitate the creation of high-quality product promotion videos without the need for actual filming. By uploading a product photo and adding a brief script, users can utilize AI Business Avatar to generate realistic avatars for their videos. These innovations aim to streamline video creation processes, offering professional outcomes effortlessly.
